curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff: the fix adds a NULL check on the return value of xmlTextReaderExpand() in rb_xml_reader_attribute_hash (ext/nokogiri/xml_reader.c). Two other call sites of xmlTextReaderExpand in the same file already had NULL checks, so no sibling locations were added. Vulnerability class null-deref confirmed: CWE-252 (Unchecked Return Value) and CWE-476 (NULL Pointer Dereference) both align with the missing NULL check before dereferencing c_node->properties.
